div.head: 352. Memorandum of Conversation Between Secretary of State Herter and Foreign Secretary LloydSource: Department of State, Conference Files: Lot 64 D 560, CF 1364. Secret. Drafted by Herter. Two other memoranda of conversation, in addition to Documents 353 and 354, covering the London Times article and Hungarian credentials at the International Labor Organization are in Department of State, Conference Files: Lot 64 D 560, CF 1364.
div.p: I spoke to Selwyn Lloyd about the fact that I was cabling the PresidentSee Document 355. suggesting he make a pretty strong statement at his press conference to the effect that nothing that he had seen coming out of Geneva would in any way justify a Summit Conference. To my great surprise, he thought this was an excellent idea and that it might have great influence in changing the atmosphere here so as to give us more hope of reaching some agreement that would justify a Summit Conference.
